samples.summary: Now it's time to really execute. Episode 2 is here. Two builders, two wildly different bets. One building AI voice tools from a farm. The other turning bartending gigs into a career engine. Who hits revenue first? Race To Revenue out Wednesday. Don't miss it.
samples.title: Now it's time to really execute. Episode 2 is here.

samples.summary: Recraft shares four photorealistic image prompts for generating nature scenes.
samples.title: Prompt 1: Photorealistic still life scene in a lush garden...

samples.summary: Test-Time Training enables AI to make discoveries on open scientific problems, outperforming prompt engineering with closed models.
samples.title: New research: Test-Time Training enables AI to discover SOTA in science with a few hundred dollars

samples.summary: PLAN0 (@PLAN0AI) turns architectural plans into construction cost estimates and analytics in minutes. They are building the Bloomberg of construction, with $20B of projects already running through the platform.
samples.title: PLAN0 (@PLAN0AI) turns architectural plans into construction cost estimates and analytics

samples.summary: Ray Dalio promotes his digital twin tool Digital Ray, emphasizing that improving outcomes requires evolving both design and people.
samples.title: Your success depends on two things: your design and your people.

samples.summary: Paul Graham states that the motivation of the hobbyist is a powerful force that keeps successful founders working on their companies beyond financial need.
samples.title: It's an unimpressive-sounding word, but one of the most powerful motivations is the motivation of the hobbyist

cluster_samples.cluster_title: NVIDIA AI highlights local AI agent capability
core_facts: NVIDIA AI shares a user experience of running a 121B model locally on DGX Spark via a Hermes agent that autonomously passed all tests.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Ray Dalio on the battle between feelings and rational thinking
core_facts: Ray Dalio discusses the internal battle between subconscious feelings (amygdala) and conscious rational thinking (prefrontal cortex).

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Monica AI launches Claude 4.7 Opus and GPT Image 2
core_facts: Monica AI announced the launch of Claude 4.7 Opus and GPT Image 2 on their platform.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: 播客讨论：李想与老罗谈AI与商业
core_facts: 播客笔记记录李想与老罗关于AI、一人公司、增效降本、裁员、出海、具身智能、人的价值等话题的讨论。

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Mem0 and BasisSet announce 2026 AI Fellowship Agentic Memory Track
core_facts: Mem0 partners with BasisSet for 2026 AI Fellowship Agentic Memory Track, applications due May 1.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: OpenAI builds sandbox for Codex on Windows
core_facts: Detailed summary of OpenAI Codex sandbox for Windows, covering design iterations and final elevated sandbox solution.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Book release: The Book of Elon
core_facts: Eric Jorgenson's 'The Book of Elon' launched, compiled from Elon Musk's public appearances.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Gemini API docs, cookbook, and Cloudflare worker example
core_facts: Links to Gemini API docs, cookbook, and Cloudflare worker example repo.
Qwen announces Qwen3.6-27B outperforming Qwen3.5-397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, SWE-bench Pro, Terminal-Bench 2.0, and SkillsBench.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Case study of Datagraphs integrating Qdrant for Graph RAG
core_facts: Qdrant presents a case study of Datagraphs, which built a knowledge graph platform integrating Qdrant for semantic search, highlighting complementary roles of vector and graph retrieval.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Qwen3.6 Plus achieves Code Arena #7 and Text Arena #36 improvements
core_facts: Qwen3.6 Plus lands at #7 in Code Arena with score 1476, up 16 points, and at #36 in Text Arena, up 13 points. AlibabaGroup moves to #3 lab in Code Arena.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Satya Nadella reports Microsoft Copilot milestones
core_facts: Satya Nadella reports over 20 million M365 Copilot seats, nearly 140,000 orgs using GitHub Copilot, and 2x increase in Security Copilot customers YoY.
Multi-Token Prediction drafters are here for Gemma 4, making inference up to 3x faster with zero quality loss. Available for E2B and E4B versions under Apache 2.0 license.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Replit teases Episode 2 of Race To Revenue
core_facts: Now it's time to really execute. Episode 2 is coming. Two builders, two wildly different bets. One building AI voice tools from a farm. The other turning bartending gigs into a career engine. Who hits revenue first? Race To Revenue out Wednesday. Don't miss it.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: 3D soft toy character 'FEEL MORE / THINK LESS' prompt
core_facts: Prompt describes a 3D soft toy-like character with glossy texture, holding a floating heart, with typography 'FEEL MORE / THINK LESS' and caption 'emotion update v2'.
known_angles: The design combines a cute character with a philosophical message.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Stanford SAIL and ETH demonstrate SDPO for RL with rich feedback
core_facts: Stanford SAIL and ETH collaboration shows RL with rich feedback significantly outperforms scalar rewards on hard tasks, introducing SDPO.
known_angles: Rich feedback provides more granular signal for hard tasks than scalar rewards.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Debate on AI's impact on labor market
core_facts: Yann LeCun states that Dario (likely Dario Amodei) is wrong about AI's labor market effects and advises listening to economists.

prompt_iteration_notes.notes: No enum expansion; prompt JSON contracts remain stable.

reasons: Use dry-run reports for manual review before write-real-db.
Candidate recall is still lexical/entity/time/source hybrid, not vector-indexed.
8 LLM failures observed in this run.

recommendations: Review uncertain relations and tune prompts with real examples.
Add vector indexes for item_cards and cluster_cards before larger runs.
Keep primary relation enum unchanged for now; it covered Phase 1.1 control flow.
Collect more source_signals before trusting source_profile priority suggestions.
Run a larger dry-run before any write-real-db semantic pass.
